Description

Adelphos will be the only building services software provider that addresses the entire process, start to finish — designed and built by industry professionals who have experienced the gap in the market.

The shift

What running this part of the business looks like today, versus with COBie Generator.

What we offer

    How it becomes agentic

    We don't drop a tool on your desk and walk away. We move you up an automation maturity ladder over weeks, not years, with a human on every step until the agent has earned autonomy.

    Features

    Everything COBie Generator ships with as a managed service. Each item is a concrete capability — no marketing fluff.

    • Pulls asset data from the Revit model — types, instances, spaces, zones
    • Checks every field against the target COBie schema version
    • Highlights missing or incomplete data with remediation suggestions
    • Returns COBie as Excel, IFC or JSON — your choice

    How we work together

    Engagement model

    Tailored to your project

    Related

    Agentic service AI Finances Automated bookkeeping, invoicing and cash-flow forecasting — driven by your live project data. App CoBie Manager Continuously populates and validates the COBie spreadsheet against the live Revit model. Every cell traceable to its source element.
